prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年物理类最低位次约894→1251→1477→1664→1619，整体呈后移趋势，近4年累计后移约725名；2024年达峰值1664后2025年小幅回升至1619，波动趋缓。\ n2021–2025年本省物理类计划分别为71、69、69、75、77人，呈小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划75人，较2025年77人缩招2人（约-2.6%），竞争略有加剧。
3. 【学校层次】985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第18名（Top20），近年排名稳定在14–18名之间，属全国顶尖高校。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端、 论文数据造假等事件；2025年投档线异常信号（全国层面）可能对报考心理产生滞后影响；抖音热度为较热（总排名第26），曝光度中等偏上；土木工程A+、城 乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A等17个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，对物理类考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工科试验班（ 计算机与电子类）等热门专业社会热度持续偏高；本省2026年物理类考生约13.69万人（估算），较2025年13.95万人略降约1.9%，竞争略有缓解；同济大学位于上海，属一线城市，对西南地区考生有较强吸引力；该校在重庆招生占比相对稳定，2025年物理类计划77人占比较小，地域偏好影响有限。 综合2025年基准位次1619、2026年缩招2人（竞争加剧）、考生数略降（竞争缓解）及声誉偏负面等因素；预计2026年物理 类最低位次约1609名，区间1426–1792名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 894 → 1251 → 1477 → 1664 → 1619, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 725 places in the past 4 years; after reaching a peak of 1664 in 2024, it slightly recovered to 1619 in 2025, with fluctuations slowing down.\ nFrom 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for Physics Category were 71, 69, 69, 75, and 77 respectively, showing a slight expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 75, a reduction of 2 students (about -2.6%) compared to 77 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition.\n3. [School Level] 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 18th (Top 20) on the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings between 14th and 18th in recent years, belonging to the top universities nationwide.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct, paper data fraud, etc.; the abnormal signal of the 2025 admission threshold (at the national level) may have a lagging impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 26th overall), with medium to high exposure; 17 A- and above disciplines including Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Engineering Pilot Class (Computer and Electronics) continue to have high social popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 136,900 (estimated), a slight decrease of about 1.9% from 139,500 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, strongly attracting candidates from the southwest region; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is relatively stable, with the 2025 Physics Category plan of 77 students accounting for a small proportion, and regional preference has limited impact. Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1619, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 2 students (intensified competition), a slight decrease in candidate numbers (eased competition), and a somewhat negative reputation; it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 1609, with a range of 1426–1792.

- Artificial Intelligence (Top Class)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Excellence Plan Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Engineering Pilot Class (Information and Intelligent Networking)
- Science Pilot Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Engineering Pilot Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and New Energy)
- Medical Pilot Class (Clinical)
- Stomatology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 1426–1792, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1426), focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors such as Guohao Elite Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>1792), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次约462→432→489→413→347，整体呈前移趋势，近5年累计前移约115名；2025年达历史最好位次347，波动较大；2021 –2023年历史类计划均为15人，2024年降至9人，2025年进一步降至8人；2026年计划10人，较2025年8人扩招2人（+25%），竞争明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双 一流；软科主榜2026年第18名（Top20），属全国顶尖高校，对历史类考生同样具有强吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面，但主要涉及理工科学术不端事件，对历 史类报考影响相对有限；抖音热度为较热，曝光度中等偏上；外国语言文学A-、马克思主义理论A-等人文社科类学科实力较强，与历史类招生专业（法学、人文 科学试验班）关联度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度持续偏热，人文科学试验班热度平稳；本省2026年历史类考生约7.21万人（估算），较2025年7.34万人略降约 1.8%，竞争略有缓解；同济大学位于上海，对西南地区历史类考生有较强吸引力；2025年历史类计划仅8人，招生人数极 少，扩招2人后竞争仍较激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次347、2026年扩招2人（+25%，竞争明显缓解）及考生数略降等因素；预 计2026年历史类最低位次约389名，区间339–439名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 462 → 432 → 489 → 413 → 347, showing an overall forward trend, with a cumulative forward movement of about 115 places in the past 5 years; in 2025, it reached the best historical ranking of 347, with large fluctuations; from 2021 to 2023, the enrollment plan for History Category was 15 students each year, dropping to 9 in 2024, and further to 8 in 2025; in 2026, the plan is 10 students, an increase of 2 students (+25%) compared to 8 in 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 18th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (Top 20), belonging to the top universities in the country, also strongly attractive to History Category candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly involves academic misconduct incidents in science and engineering, which have relatively limited impact on History Category applications; Douyin popularity is relatively hot, with medium to high exposure; Foreign Language and Literature (A-), Marxist Theory (A-), and other humanities and social science disciplines are relatively strong, highly related to History Category enrollment majors (Law, Humanities Experimental Class).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Law major continues to be relatively hot, while the Humanities Experimental Class has stable popularity; in 2026, the number of History Category candidates in this province is approximately 72,100 (estimated), a slight decrease of about 1.8% from 73,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong attraction for History Category candidates from the southwestern region; in 2025, the History Category enrollment plan was only 8 students, with extremely small enrollment numbers, and competition remains relatively intense even after the expansion of 2 students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 347, the 2026 expansion of 2 students (+25%, significantly easing competition), and a slight decrease in the number of candidates; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 389, with a range of 339–439.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (including dual degree training programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Humanities Experimental Class (including dual degree training programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

No other History Category enrollment majors currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are only 2 enrollment majors in History Category, with rankings within the predicted range of 339–439. It is recommended to use Law as a Tier 1 sprint and Humanities Experimental Class as a Tier 2 safety; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<339) can focus on sprinting for the Law major.
